rationale: Flaky CI test due to System.nanoTime() precision; internal test timing issue, no spec behavior.
Race condition in ServerDescription access within DefaultServer; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
BSON spec requires BsonInt64 decoded as Long; driver reads it as Integer, causing ClassCastException.
Async listCollections checks out two connections unnecessarily; implementation inefficiency, no CMAP spec rule violated.
CSFLE MongoClient sharing causes connection starvation; architectural/performance issue, description defers to DRIVERS-1459.
Removing outdated API examples from docs; documentation fix, no spec behavior involved.
Improving TLS/SSL certificate documentation layout; purely a docs improvement.
Unified test format spec test reveals driver fails to include resumeAfter from postBatchResumeToken after failed getMore.
Race condition in NettyStream timeout scheduling causing spurious connection invalidation; internal async implementation bug.
Missing OSGi manifest entry for reactor.core; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1505; fixing test failure due to $listLocalSessions not supported in API version 1.
Unified test runner implementation doesn't fail test when operation unexpectedly throws; fixing test runner behavior per spec.
Correcting incorrect doc statement about cold publishers in reactive streams; documentation fix only.
Adding @Immutable annotation to ServerCursor Javadoc; documentation/API annotation, no spec behavior.
Documenting publisher properties in API docs; documentation improvement, no spec behavior.
Improving ReferenceCounted interface Javadoc clarity; internal documentation, no spec behavior.
CryptBinding.retain() returns wrong reference; internal API contract violation, not a MongoDB spec issue.
AsyncSessionBinding.retain() returns wrong reference; internal reference-counting contract, not a MongoDB spec.

Adding spec tests for invalid relaxed UUIDs per DRIVERS-1526; test infrastructure addition.
Extended JSON $uuid parsing too permissive vs. spec grammar; driver fails new spec test for UUID hyphen placement validation.
Regression in memory consumption and performance after reactive streams implementation rewrite; performance issue only.
Security concern about MD5 use in GridFS upload; security/algorithm choice, not a spec conformance bug.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1437; changing estimatedDocumentCount to use $collStats per spec requirement.
Server cursor not killed when Subscriber.onNext throws; reactive streams exception handling edge case, not a MongoDB spec rule.

Preparing change stream code to accept unified test format files; test runner infrastructure work.

Internal refactor of StringUtils in BSON module; code cleanup, no behavior change.
Adding spec test per DRIVERS-1538 to ensure operations succeed when no expectError/expectResult; unified test runner test.
Hard dependency on jdk.net.ExtendedSocketOptions may not be available; JVM deployment/packaging bug.
Updating Scala version dependencies; build/dependency maintenance, no spec behavior.

Re-enabling previously disabled AWS auth tests; CI/test infrastructure fix, no spec conformance issue.
Suppressing compiler warnings about empty try blocks in CSFLE code; code quality, no spec behavior.
Fixing Scaladoc warnings; documentation/tooling, no spec behavior.

Adding support for unified test runner schema version 1.2 with loop operation; test infrastructure update.
Removing jcenter repository from build scripts after service shutdown; build maintenance.

Issue split from DRIVERS-1504; updating versioned API transaction-handling spec test files.
Flaky doc sample test due to causal consistency not used; test isolation bug, no driver spec conformance issue.
